job_title: View job: Scientist 2-Spatial Biology and Biophysics
job_description:
• 3+ years of relevant experience in situ hybridization, imaging and spatial techniques, preferably in the Biotechnology industry.
• Strong analytical background Strong organizational skills.
• Strong written and oral communication skills.
• Strong troubleshooting and problem solving skills.
• Experience with the 10x Genomics Xenium platform is a plus.
• Skills in image analysis are a plus.
• PhD in Molecular Biology, Biophysics, Physical Chemistry or related field.
• Proven ability to design novel molecular biology assay schemes, as evidenced by peer-reviewed publications or published patents.

job_title: Software Developer – Physical & Edge AI Platforms
job_description:
• Edge and physical AI systems impose outstanding requirements on software platforms.
• These platforms need to be secure, reliable, updatable, and easy for developers to use.
• They must also function within real-world limits not found in the cloud.
• Build software that performs reliably under edge constraints such as limited resources, real-time requirements, and heterogeneous hardware.
• Strong experience crafting and building systems software, platform services, or distributed systems in production.
• Experience with container technologies and modern packaging/deployment approaches.
• Background in robotics, vision systems, or physical AI applications.
• Experience building developer platforms, SDKs, or internal tooling.

• You will use your experience and judgment to plan and accomplish goals, as well as generate innovative solutions by applying creative and effective approaches to complex problems and opportunities.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet software engineering requirements.
• It requires collaboration with certification engineers to ensure product compliance with current standards.
• Key responsibilities include addressing product quality and manufacturing issues through root-cause analysis, leading customer discussions to define requirements, mentoring junior engineers, and improving work practices and processes.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet engineering support requirements.
• The position requires collaborating with cross-functional teams to ensure solutions meet scalability, security, and compliance standards, while providing technical leadership to align integrations with organizational goals.
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to meet engineering support requirements.
